title: Deleted integration Automation triggered

posts.author: JulesL (Laisné)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone, I am encountering a really weird situation where a “ghost” integration is running on some boards. For context, I have installed a custom app and set up recipes on different boards. The app is working fine and I have upgraded its version a few times. On a few boards, not all, There is a duplicate automation not listed that is running. As shown in the run history below, we can seen that a deleted automation is successfully executing at the same time as its actual live version. Has anyone ever face this issue? Deleting the board is not an option as the issue occured on multiple boards and they are actively used.

historu1837×880 55.6 KB

Thanks for your help!

posts.author: Chris2 (Chris)
posts.cookedHtml: Anyone ever reply? Having the same issue with a Google Calendar integration…
